stemHtml: What are the approximate dimensions of a typical, fully developed Tropical Revolving Storm (TRS)?

options.a:
Diameter of the eye: 30 - 70 km
Diameter of the whole TRS: 800 km
options.b:
Diameter of the eye: 30 - 50 km
Diameter of the whole TRS: 400 - 500 km
options.c:
Diameter of the eye: 100 - 150 km
Diameter of the whole TRS: 1200 km
options.d:
Diameter of the eye: 10 - 20 km
Diameter of the whole TRS: 250 - 300 km
